## Checklist

- [ ] I have **express permission** from John Valachovic (or am the copyright holder) for this contribution scope, per [LICENSE](../LICENSE).
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] If `client/js/` or entry HTML changed: smoke-tested with `npm run launch` (primary and legacy entry if shared engine code).
- [ ] Canonical docs updated per [docs/README.md](../docs/README.md#documentation-maintenance-required) when behavior or APIs changed.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, API keys, or personal health data in this PR.

## Wellness / safety (if audio or protocols touched)

- [ ] Copy still states wellness tool / not medical device where user-facing.
- [ ] No new implied clinical claims without research citation in `docs/research/`.
